description_long: This is a medium-sized, ornate book with a deep purple cover bordered by intricate gold patterns. The book is open, revealing several yellowed pages filled with mysterious, hand-drawn symbols or runes, suggesting an ancient or magical theme. The cover is reinforced with black, angular corner and spine guards, giving it a robust and somewhat mystical appearance. The pages appear aged and slightly uneven, further enhancing the impression of age and importance. The book's spine is thick and heavily protected, with the black reinforcements extending to the corners of the cover. The overall design suggests it could be a spellbook or a tome of secrets, likely to be found in a fantasy or urban fantasy setting.
description: An ornate, purple book with gold detailing and black reinforced corners, open to reveal aged pages covered in mysterious runes.
description_view_0: Side view showing the book open with several yellowed pages inscribed with runes, and the black reinforced spine and corners visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the purple cover with gold border patterns and the symmetrical black corner and spine guards.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the open pages and the black spine reinforcement.
description_view_3: Direct view of the open book, focusing on the runic script covering the inner pages and the symmetrical black corner guards.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is thick and reinforced with black, angular guards, matching the corners. No text or decorative patterns are visible on the spine.
